content: Backtest overfitting / min sample (Bailey & Lopez de Prado, cross-checked): statistical floor ~30 trades, ~100 for basic metric reliability, 200-500 for institutional confidence; trade count alone insufficient (regime coverage matters). Deflated Sharpe Ratio adjusts for multiple testing + non-normality + sample length. Probability of Backtest Overfitting (PBO) rises fast with #trials. Random CV leaks future info in time series -> use walk-forward / purged K-fold; report out-of-sample only. IMPLICATION: 13 closed trades + ~1 month chains is FAR below the 30-trade floor -> cannot do per-rule weight OPTIMIZATION; only directional sanity checks + mechanics validation are honest.
